use.flag: Build with 64-bit floating point precision (default is single precision).
Enable support for CUDA with dev-util/nvidia-cuda-toolkit
Build the graphical interface (requires either qt5 or qt6).
Use Qt5 (dev-qt/qtwidgets) for the GUI. Legacy; prefer qt6 for new installs.
Use Qt6 (dev-qt/qtbase) for the GUI. Recommended.
